name: shift_with_wider_unsigned_input_than_output
description: Code should include a shift operation where the shift amount input has a larger unsigned bit-width than the result output width, causing width mismatch during cell splitting.
snippet: assign y = a << b; // B_WIDTH > Y_WIDTH with B unsigned

name: ternary_with_x_value_condition
description: Code should include a ternary expression where the condition resolves to x (undefined), triggering simplified internal cells with mismatched port widths during processing.
snippet: assign y = cond ? (a << b) : 1'b0; // cond is unknown/x
